finding: The stack workflow generated a composite evidence file but had no independent fail-closed validator proving that the source commit, Worker identity proof, live atomicity proof, redeployment persistence proof, Pages URL, Pages proof file, and ordering invariant were all simultaneously present and accepted.
design_implication: Validate the final composite evidence packet as a separate gate before it can be treated as deployment proof. Reject commit substitution, missing Worker proofs, false Pages proof claims, non-HTTPS deployment URLs, and ordering-invariant drift.

verification.method: isolated Node test against byte-equivalent implementation logic
cases: source commit substitution and failed redeployment proof rejected
Pages proof claim without URL or proof file rejected

evidence_strength: test-verified validator behavior; not live Cloudflare deployment proof
privacy_boundary: No secrets, private chat, health material, credentials, account identifiers, or raw deployment tokens are stored.
limits: The validator is committed but not yet wired into cloudflare-research-stack.yml.
No Cloudflare workflow run or live Pages hostname was available in this run.
Structural proof consistency does not establish scientific or medical truth.
falsification_route: Supply a composite packet with any substituted commit, failed proof, missing HTTPS URL, absent Pages proof, or altered ordering invariant; acceptance must be false with a deterministic reason.
